name: Caviar with Pasta Filler
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Thin spaghetti, cook al dente
2 oz Jar Romanoff golden white-fish caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the chopped green onion and cook for 1 minute.
3. Stir in the heavy cream and lemon peel. Heat through until the mixture is warm.
4. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente, then drain.
5. Toss the cooked spaghetti with the sauce until well combined.
6. Transfer the pasta mixture to a heated serving platter.
7. Top with dollops of Romanoff golden white-fish caviar.
